item.title: Starting out as a builder: practical advice
item.description: Breaking into the building trade can feel overwhelming — but the right advice early on makes all the difference. Practical, experience-based guidance for anyone looking to get started. What do you wish you had known at the beginning?

media:content.media:title: Starting out as a builder: practical advice
media:content.media:description: Breaking into the building trade can feel overwhelming — but the right advice early on makes all the difference. Practical, experience-based guidance for anyone looking to get started. What do you wish you had known at the beginning?

item.title: Roof framing explained: how it all comes together
item.description: Roof framing is one of the most critical — and most misunderstood — stages of any build. This clear, practical breakdown covers exactly how it works and why it matters. Has roof framing ever confused you?

media:content.media:title: Roof framing explained: how it all comes together
media:content.media:description: Roof framing is one of the most critical — and most misunderstood — stages of any build. This clear, practical breakdown covers exactly how it works and why it matters. Has roof framing ever confused you?

item.title: House build EP 11: tackling the exterior trim
item.description: Episode 11 of the house build series arrives at one of the most satisfying stages — the exterior trim. The finishing details that pull the whole look of a home together. How many episodes have you been following along?

media:content.media:title: House build EP 11: tackling the exterior trim
media:content.media:description: Episode 11 of the house build series arrives at one of the most satisfying stages — the exterior trim. The finishing details that pull the whole look of a home together. How many episodes have you been following along?

item.title: How this property became a successful business
item.description: Not every property is just a home — some become thriving business ventures with the right vision and planning. Find out what makes this one work so well. Could you turn a property into a business?

media:content.media:title: How this property became a successful business
media:content.media:description: Not every property is just a home — some become thriving business ventures with the right vision and planning. Find out what makes this one work so well. Could you turn a property into a business?

item.title: Taking on a build challenge that seems impossible
item.description: Some projects look completely undoable at first glance — but a skilled builder has a way of finding a path through. Watch how this seemingly impossible challenge gets solved. Could you have figured it out?

media:content.media:title: Taking on a build challenge that seems impossible
media:content.media:description: Some projects look completely undoable at first glance — but a skilled builder has a way of finding a path through. Watch how this seemingly impossible challenge gets solved. Could you have figured it out?

item.title: The journey of building a dream home from scratch
item.description: Every dream home starts as an idea — and then the real work begins. Follow along as the vision slowly takes shape, one stage at a time. What would your dream home look like?

media:content.media:title: The journey of building a dream home from scratch
media:content.media:description: Every dream home starts as an idea — and then the real work begins. Follow along as the vision slowly takes shape, one stage at a time. What would your dream home look like?

item.title: How to lay a solid block foundation from scratch
item.description: A strong build starts with a strong foundation — and this video walks through the process of laying a block foundation the right way. A must-watch for anyone planning a serious construction project. Have you ever laid blocks before?

media:content.media:title: How to lay a solid block foundation from scratch
media:content.media:description: A strong build starts with a strong foundation — and this video walks through the process of laying a block foundation the right way. A must-watch for anyone planning a serious construction project. Have you ever laid blocks before?

item.title: Decking and more on the mountain cabin build
item.description: The mountain cabin build reaches a milestone as the decking goes in and more of the vision comes to life. Each stage brings this project closer to the finished retreat. What feature of this cabin excites you most?

media:content.media:title: Decking and more on the mountain cabin build
media:content.media:description: The mountain cabin build reaches a milestone as the decking goes in and more of the vision comes to life. Each stage brings this project closer to the finished retreat. What feature of this cabin excites you most?

item.title: A step-by-step stairwell wall replacement
item.description: Stairwell walls take a beating over time — and replacing them is more involved than it looks. Watch a practical, hands-on approach to getting the job done cleanly and efficiently. Have you ever tackled a wall replacement yourself?

media:content.media:title: A step-by-step stairwell wall replacement
media:content.media:description: Stairwell walls take a beating over time — and replacing them is more involved than it looks. Watch a practical, hands-on approach to getting the job done cleanly and efficiently. Have you ever tackled a wall replacement yourself?

item.title: Siding and trim day on the mountain cabin build
item.description: The mountain cabin build keeps moving forward as the team tackles siding and trim — the details that start to make a structure really feel like a home. How close is this cabin to completion?

media:content.media:title: Siding and trim day on the mountain cabin build
media:content.media:description: The mountain cabin build keeps moving forward as the team tackles siding and trim — the details that start to make a structure really feel like a home. How close is this cabin to completion?

item.title: One simple trick to keep cables tangle-free
item.description: Cable tangles are one of those small frustrations that add up fast on any job site or workshop. This one easy technique puts an end to them for good. Why didn't anyone think of this sooner?

media:content.media:title: One simple trick to keep cables tangle-free
media:content.media:description: Cable tangles are one of those small frustrations that add up fast on any job site or workshop. This one easy technique puts an end to them for good. Why didn't anyone think of this sooner?

item.title: Quick and easy techniques for laying blocks
item.description: Block laying doesn't have to be slow or complicated. These tried-and-tested techniques help speed up the process without cutting corners on quality. Which of these will you add to your build routine? (

media:content.media:title: Quick and easy techniques for laying blocks
media:content.media:description: Block laying doesn't have to be slow or complicated. These tried-and-tested techniques help speed up the process without cutting corners on quality. Which of these will you add to your build routine? (

item.title: Jamie takes the lead at the Nantahala retreat
item.description: Jamie steps up to lead the charge on the Nantahala retreat build — with the results you would expect. A fun look at what happens when someone new takes the reins on a big project. How do you think Jamie did?

media:content.media:title: Jamie takes the lead at the Nantahala retreat
media:content.media:description: Jamie steps up to lead the charge on the Nantahala retreat build — with the results you would expect. A fun look at what happens when someone new takes the reins on a big project. How do you think Jamie did?
